windowsDns.title: DNS
windowsDns.description: Manage DNS zones, records and access.

index.label: DNS Management
index.title: DNS Zones
index.subtitle: Manage your DNS zones and records.
index.noZonesFoundMessage: No DNS zones found. Onboard your first DNS zone by clicking "Create Zone".
index.accountRecreatedNoZonesMessage: No DNS zones found. Onboard your first DNS zone by clicking "Create Zone".
index.needsAdminSetup: Contact an administrator to activate zones.

zoneList.label: DNS Zones
zoneList.title: DNS Zones
zoneList.shiftClickHint: Tip: Hold Shift and click to select multiple

delegation.pendingTooltip: Domain is not pointing to our nameservers. Missing: {missing}
delegation.activeTooltip: Domain is correctly delegated to our nameservers
delegation.updateNameservers: Update nameservers at your registrar to:

onboard.label: Onboarding
onboard.title: Create DNS Zone
onboard.subtitle: We guide you through adding the domain. Point name servers at your registrar; propagation can take up to 24 hours.
onboard.nameServersTitle: Change name servers at your registrar to:
onboard.propagation: Propagation can take up to 24 hours after changing name servers.
onboard.noServersError: No DNS servers available. Please configure a server first.

zoneInfo.label: Zone Information
zoneInfo.title: Zone Info (SOA)
zoneInfo.notFound: SOA record not found for this zone.

zone.label: DNS Zone
zone.invalidZoneId: Invalid zone ID. Go back and try again.

danger.label: Danger zone
danger.title: Delete DNS zone
danger.description: This will permanently delete the zone and all DNS records. Cannot be undone.

delete.confirmDescription: This will permanently delete the zone and all records. Cannot be undone.
delete.enterName: Enter the zone name to confirm:
delete.ack: I understand that this action cannot be undone.

records.label: DNS Records
records.title: Records for {zoneName}

fields.name: Name
fields.commentPlaceholder: Internal note about this record (not visible in DNS)

records.contentRequired: Please enter a value for the new record before saving.

redirectManaged.tooltip: This DNS record is automatically managed by the Redirect service
redirectManaged.editWarning: This record is managed by Redirects. Changes may affect redirects.

autodiscover.label: Autodiscover Zones
autodiscover.title: Autodiscover Zones
autodiscover.subtitle: Find zones that match your organization's COREID and activate them.

info.title: Autodiscover searches for zones with a TXT record at _coreid.<zone> containing

autodiscover.noZonesFound: No zones found matching your COREID
autodiscover.noZonesHint: Make sure zones have a TXT record at _coreid.<zone> with the value COREID=<your-id>

manageZones.title: Manage zones
manageZones.subtitle: View, activate or hide zones for your organization.
manageZones.noZonesHint: Make sure zones have a TXT record at _coreid.<zone> with the value COREID={coreId}
manageZones.confirmHide: Hide {count} {zoneWord}? They will no longer be visible or accessible.
manageZones.confirmShow: Show {count} {zoneWord}? They will become accessible again.

delete.confirmDescription: This will permanently delete {count} zone(s) including all DNS records. Cannot be undone.
delete.ack: I understand that this action cannot be undone.
